spec_match.rationale: The lockup demo perfectly showcases the combined power of balance (expanding brand) and scale-down (shrinking tagline) to align widths.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactivity. Features native horizontal drag resize, gallery width slider, comparison slider, and live support detection.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb matches the demo's focus on brand + tagline pair scaling together.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a comprehensive JS fallback using ResizeObserver for browsers that do not support text-fit yet, which is outstanding.

references.rationale: The page includes the ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses design system CSS variables and fits the monospace editorial aesthetic.

summary: An exemplary demo that sets a high bar. It combines multiple interactive techniques (sliders, CSS resize) to demonstrate the feature, includes accurate feature detection, and implements a fully functional JS fallback for non-supporting browsers. No open questions.
